templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Standard Terms)
templates.description: Common Paper standard Mutual NDA: the Standard Terms document that pairs with a Cover Page to form an executed mutual confidentiality agreement.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Cover Page)
templates.description: Common Paper Mutual NDA Cover Page: the signable, deal-specific page (purpose, term, governing law, signatures) that incorporates the MNDA Standard Terms by reference.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement covering access, support, payment, data, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality for SaaS / cloud products.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for giving early users access to a product in exchange for feedback that informs product development.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement defining target uptime, target response time, service credits, and termination remedies for a cloud service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement governing scoped services performed under SOWs, including deliverables, IP, payment, warranties, and indemnification.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement addressing controller/processor and subprocessor relationships, EEA/UK cross-border transfers, security incidents, and data subject rights under GDPR-style regimes.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement granting a limited license to install and use software, including updates, restrictions, open source, and warranties.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement covering cooperation obligations, trademark license, fees, dispute escalation, and termination for go-to-market or co-marketing partnerships.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement giving a customer time-limited access to a product for evaluation prior to entering a longer-term Definitive Agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard HIPAA Business Associate Agreement establishing PHI safeguards, permitted uses, subcontractor obligations, and breach reporting between a Covered Entity and a Business Associate.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper Standard AI Addendum supplementing an underlying agreement to cover AI service use, input/output ownership, model training restrictions, and AI-specific disclaimers.
